blocks.text: `internal/hostintegration.WorkspaceGrantStore` is the pure C11 model for user workspace root access. C6 consumes active grant records during workdir preparation; OS bookmark or folder-picker token bytes stay adapter-owned.

blocks.code:
WorkspaceGrantRecord {
    workspaceID string
    channel     DistributionChannel
    hostOS      "darwin" | "windows"
    method      "dev-local-path" | "user-selected-folder" |
                "security-scoped-bookmark" | "windows-folder-picker-grant"
    rootPath    string
    grantedAt   time
    revokedAt   time?
}

items: Workdir root and user workspace root are always separate.
An active grant still needs `ConsentLedger` workspace access consent before C6 materialization is allowed.
Revocation keeps the record as evidence but removes it from the active grant view.
